name: MedKit
short:
Type: Medical Supplies
Purpose: Quick restoration of health
Features: Allows for full restoration
desc: Whether it's a critical wound or a small scratch, the MedKit will fix it in no time.

name: Old Smuggler's Jacket
short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 1
Features: Regenerates over time
desc: The leather is sturdy enough to save you from a shot or two.

name: SGOW SW.52 Body Armor (decommissioned)
short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 2
Features: Regenerates over time
desc: A well-worn breastplate, quilted jacket, and stylish belt – it immediately becomes clear that the wearer is not only ready for battle, but has already been through many.

name: SGOW SW.73 Light Armor
short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 3
Features: Regenerates over time
desc: The standard armor of combat sailors and field officers of the Kaiser's fleet. The breastplate can reflect even the sun's rays. In it, you will be the most stylish Galician <s>marauder</s> scientist of all! And definitely the most resilient.

name: Green Key
short:
Type: Key
Suitable for: Green doors
Features: One-time use

The barely distinguishable text on the tag states the following: "Chi_f Dis_r_ct Ac_o_nt_nt's Office, K__s__pl__ isla_d".
desc:
Opens something marked with green, but what exactly?
The barely distinguishable text on the tag states the following: "Chi_f Dis_r_ct Ac_o_nt_nt's Office, K__s__pl__ isla_d".

name: Box Key
short:
Type: Key
Suitable for: Locked boxes and crates
Features: One-time use
desc: Looks suitable for a small lock, like those used on chests or boxes.

name: Worn 40 mm Autocannon Kit
short:
Type: Artillery
Caliber: 40 mm
Range: Medium

State: Worn

Features: May jam when overheated
desc:
Some ingenious engineers at the station decided that this twin-barreled anti-aircraft cannon would work perfectly fine against ground targets as well. Because of the old barrel design, the cannon may overheat and jam if it shoots consecutively for too long.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

Has signs of active use.

Utilizes 40 mm shells.

name: Pristine 40 mm Autocannon Kit
short:
Type: Artillery
Caliber: 40 mm
Range: Medium

State: Pristine

Features: May jam when overheated
desc:
Some ingenious engineers at the station decided that this twin-barreled anti-aircraft cannon would work perfectly fine against ground targets as well. Because of the old barrel design, the cannon may overheat and jam if it shoots consecutively for too long.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

In perfect condition, as if fresh from the factory.

Utilizes 40 mm shells.

name: Worn 70 mm Shotgun Cannon Kit
short:
Type: Artillery
Caliber: 70 mm
Range: Short

State: Worn
desc:
A cannon designed for buckshot shells that disperse many small projectiles when fired. The armor plate mounted on the front of the turret will protect the cannon operator from most gunfire. It is highly lethal against infantry at close range. The projectiles are solid enough to deal some damage to structures as well.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

Has signs of active use.

Utilizes 70 mm shells.

name: Pristine 70 mm Shotgun Cannon Kit
short:
Type: Artillery
Caliber: 70 mm
Range: Short

State: Pristine
desc:
A cannon designed for buckshot shells that disperse many small projectiles when fired. The armor plate mounted on the front of the turret will protect the cannon operator from most gunfire. It is highly lethal against infantry at close range. The projectiles are solid enough to deal some damage to structures as well.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

In perfect condition, as if fresh from the factory.

Utilizes 70 mm shells.

name: Worn 80 mm Naval Cannon Kit
short:
Type: Artillery
Caliber: 80 mm
Range: High

State: Worn
desc:
A naval cannon stripped from Sophie's military fleet tramplers by scavengers. Covers great distances but is quite hard to operate due to its slow rate of fire.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

Has signs of active use.

Utilizes 80 mm shells.

name: Pristine 80 mm Naval Cannon Kit
short:
Type: Artillery
Caliber: 80 mm
Range: High

State: Pristine
desc:
A naval cannon stripped from Sophie's military fleet tramplers by scavengers. Covers great distances but is quite hard to operate due to its slow rate of fire.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

In perfect condition, as if fresh from the factory.

Utilizes 80 mm shells.

name: Alloy Steel
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, Tech Tree
desc:
The latest development in the world of metallurgy, this steel with the addition of alloying elements allows it to withstand much higher temperatures and be more resistant to physical damage. It was thanks to this development that Ironclad tramplers gained their ability to land directly from orbit.
Other metals simply wouldn't be able to withstand such temperatures and stress from a fall.

name: NZ Mk1 Modified Energy Rod
short:
Type: Fuel
Base: Aurogen
Purpose: Increases the reactor's stored energy level
Features: Short-term increase in trampler speed (low)
desc:
A main energy source. A standardized capsule with aurogen that fits most reactors and motor-reactors.
Makes your trampler go really fast for a short time thanks to the modernization of the valve system, which gives the motor-reactor a short burst of extra energy right after the rod is activated.

name: Time Bomb
short:
Type: Explosives
Fuse: Clockwork
Damage: Moderate
desc: An incredibly serious argument that can open a lot of doors for you. Make sure to activate it before running away.

name: Canned Sea Deer XL
short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Trading, Tech Tree
desc: An XL-sized can of the famous Sea Deer, an exotic fish discovered by Sophie's first colonists.

name: Crowns
short:
Type: Money
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree, tramplers
desc: The main currency here. Has a familiar face on it.

name: Raw Aurogen Crystal
short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree

Features: Hazardous radiation
desc: A fragment of a strange crystal, ready for transport. Caution – radiation hazard.

name: District Officer's Portable Safe
short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Trading, Tech Tree
desc: A safe that contains something very valuable that belonged to the District Officer. Considering how bureaucratic the Austro-Hungarians are, it's probably a bunch of documents.

name: NZ Mk2 Energy Rod
short:
Type: Fuel
Base: Aurogen
Purpose: Increases the reactor's stored energy level
desc: Your main source of energy. Put it in your reactor to keep the trampler working.

name: Canned Food
short:
Type: Food
Features:
- When consumed, regenerates health;
- When placed in the trampler's fridge or other storage, allows for quick respawning
desc: The amount of food on board the trampler determines the number of quick respawns available for the Crew. You also can just eat it to improve your well-being.

name: HG-6 Contact Grenade
short:
Type: Grenade
Fuse: Contact
Damage: High
desc: A single-use hand grenade – or a reusable mace. Fragile. Handle with care.

name: Ironclad's Cargo Box
short: A crate that belonged to an Ironclad trampler.

name: Ironclad's Cargo Box
short: A crate that belonged to an Ironclad trampler.

name: Ironclad's Cargo Box
short: A crate that belonged to an Ironclad trampler.

name: MedKit
short:
Type: Medical Supplies
Purpose: Quick restoration of health
Features: Allows for full restoration
desc: Whether it's a critical wound or a small scratch, the MedKit will fix it in no time.

name: 8x21 mm Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 8 mm
Suitable for: Pistols and revolvers
desc: Basic ammo used by most small firearms. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 8x21 mm FMJ Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 8 mm
Suitable for: Pistols and revolvers
Features: Armor-piercing
desc: Special ammo used by most small firearms. Its full metal jacket makes it highly effective against armor. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 8x21 mm HV Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 8 mm
Suitable for: Pistols and revolvers
Features: Increased velocity
desc: Special high-velocity ammo used by most small firearms. Its increased powder charge makes bullets fly faster compared to standard ammunition. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: Repair Kit
short:
Type: Tool
Purpose: Quick on-site repairs
Features: Allows for major repairs and restoration of destroyed trampler compartments
desc: If you've noticed that your trampler has more holes than it has walls, this is the right tool to use.

name: M82 Rifle
short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Rifle
Caliber: 9 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: High
Reloading Speed: Medium
desc: The SGOW M82 9 mm revolver rifle. Highly versatile like a Swiss Army knife. Quite slow when it comes to reloading.

name: Coral Dust
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Rare subspecies of local coral, additionally cleaned and ground into powder. Widely used in military and pharmaceutical fields.

name: Coral Chunk
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: One of the most common souvenirs brought by tourists from Sophie, it is a fairly valuable resource required in the production of some items.

name: Fabric
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Usually a common material, but not in this case: over the years, most local fabric items have either crumbled to dust or are beyond salvage.

name: Fabric Scraps
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Various pieces of fabric and leather, mostly remnants of clothing, tents, carpets, curtains and even sails, left long ago in the harsh desert climate. However, some look quite new.

name: Gunpowder
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Standard military gunpowder. Not of the best quality due to cheap components, nevertheless sufficient for mass production. Used for most conventional military ammunition.

name: High-Grade Gunpowder
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: The new smokeless gunpowder recipe, discovered on Sophie. The Imperial forces combined their regular gunpowder with coral dust, resulting in a powder that lasted longer and produced much less smoke.

name: Leviathan Meat
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: The lump of meat of a mysterious creature that lurks beneath the sands. But where's the carcass?

name: Leviathan Skin
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: A piece of skin that, by its texture, is reminiscent of a snake's skin but, by the looks of it, this piece belonged to something way bigger that a snake.

name: Scrap Metal
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Various parts – anything made from metal – gathered into one pile.

name: Metal Rods
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: High-quality metal forged into rods – ready for use and easy to transport.

name: Mechanical Parts
short:
Type: Spare Parts
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree, tramplers
desc: Commonly used parts in heavy-duty machinery.

name: Pneumatic Parts
short:
Type: Spare Parts
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree, tramplers
desc: Crucial elements in more sophisticated machinery.

name: Computing Module
short:
Type: Spare Parts
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree, tramplers
desc: These parts were used in the most technological marvels created by the brightest minds of the Empire.

name: Mixtures
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Various mixtures, syrups, tinctures and pills that were widely available for practically anyone on Sophie.

name: Optic Lenses
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: These lenses were used everywhere: from rifle and gun sights to eyeglasses and binoculars. Due to their fragile structure, there are not many left on Sophie, so they are considered very valuable.

name: Reinforced Leather Strips
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Strips of leather sewn with fabric are a fairly durable material used to make uniforms, shoulder pads, and body armor for imperial troops.

name: Scrapped Ammo
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: This ammo will likely blow up in your hands or won't work at all if you try to use it. But the materials from it can still be salvaged and repurposed.

name: Threads
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: A basic spool of thread used by anyone.

name: Weapon Parts
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Receivers, spare barrels, gas tubes and other replaceable parts of regular military weapons.

name: EB "Vita" Police Revolver
short:
Type: Revolver
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: Short
Reloading Speed: High
desc: A modified 8 mm revolver manufactured by Eisenblut, used by the Sophie Gendarmerie. Received a six-shot drum compatible with speed loading.

name: EB "Tiszt" Award Revolver
short:
Type: Revolver
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 8 rounds
Range: Short
Reloading Speed: High
desc: A special modification of the 8 mm revolver manufactured by Eisenblut, used as decoration for personal service to the state, courage and high professionalism. In addition to artistic decoration, the revolver also received an eight-shot drum compatible with speed loading.

name: EB "Zseb" Revolver
short:
Type: Revolver
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: Short
Reloading Speed: Low
desc: One of the cheapest 8 mm revolvers you can find on the grey market. Production – Eisenblut; sales – virtually any arms dealer.

name: EB "Bantam" Revolver
short:
Type: Revolver
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: Short
Reloading Speed: Low
Features: Increased melee damage
desc: A six-shot 8 mm revolver made by Eisenblut, improved by Kaiser's Friends for very close combat encounters.

name: 9x42 mm Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 9 mm
Suitable for: Rifles
desc: Ammo that is used by most infantry rifles. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 9x42 mm FMJ Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 9 mm
Suitable for: Rifles
Features: Armor-piercing
desc: Special ammo for basic infantry rifles. Its full metal jacket makes it highly effective against armor. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 9x42 mm HV Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 9 mm
Suitable for: Rifles
Features: Increased velocity
desc: Special high-velocity ammo for basic infantry rifles. Increased powder charge makes bullets fly faster compared to standard ammunition. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: M1866/9 "Einzel" Breechloader
short:
Type: Single-Shot Rifle
Caliber: 9 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Medium
Reloading Speed: Low
desc: Shoot, reload, repeat. A very cheap and affordable breech-loading rifle, chambered for 9 mm cartridges. Another link in the evolution of firearms from muzzle-loading muskets to modern rifles.

name: KF886/9R "Mehrzel" Repeater
short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Rifle
Caliber: 9 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: High
Reloading Speed: High
desc: A field modification of a 9 mm breechloader by Kaiser's Friends as an attempt to convert a mass-produced single-shot musket into a magazine-fed rifle. Although a fairly successful modification, it was not widely used due to its excessive complexity.

name: M82 "Aperture" Rifle
short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Rifle
Caliber: 9 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: High
Reloading speed: High
Features: Aperture sight
desc: The SGOW M82 9 mm revolver rifle with a modified aperture sight. Highly versatile like a Swiss Army knife. Quite slow when it comes to reloading. Mounted with the special sights that allow the shooter to cover longer distances with increased accuracy.

name: RW1 Rocket Launcher
short:
Type: Rocket Launcher
Ammo: Rockets
Magazine: 1
Range: Medium
Reloading Speed: Low
desc: The Raketenwerfer 1 is one of the secret prototypes built by the Kaiser's SGOW engineers on Sophie. Unfortunately, it never reached Earth -– the entire batch was "lost" during the mass evacuation.

name: Armor-Piercing Rocket
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: Rocket
Suitable for: Rocket launchers
Features: Increased damage against tramplers
desc: An unofficial rocket for the RW1 rocket launcher, handmade by someone very resourceful. Packs a punch, but is ineffective against infantry.

name: High-Explosive Rocket
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: Rocket
Suitable for: Rocket Launchers
Features: Increased damage against infantry
desc: An unofficial rocket for the RW1 rocket launcher, handmade by someone very resourceful. Not effective against armor, but capable of inflicting significant damage to infantry in a fairly large radius.

name: Blitz 10R Pistol
short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Pistol
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 10 rounds
Range: Medium
Reloading speed: High
desc: The O'Donnel "Blitz" 8 mm semi-automatic pistol. Swift and deadly. Highly effective in close quarters. Compensates for its low accuracy with a high fire rate.

name: Blitz PPS-5 Pistol
short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Pistol
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 5 rounds
Range: Medium
Reloading Speed: High
desc: The O'Donnel "Blitz" 8 mm semi-automatic pistol. Swift and deadly. A preproduction sample with a reduced capacity magazine capable of holding five rounds.

name: Blitz 15R Pistol
short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Pistol
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 15 rounds
Range: Medium
Reloading Speed: High
desc: The O'Donnel "Blitz" 8 mm semi-automatic pistol. Swift and deadly. A rare modification with an increased capacity magazine, capable of holding 15 rounds. Even more bullets to miss the target with.

name: Pepper Mill Shotgun
short:
Type: Shotgun
Caliber: 12 GA
Magazine: 3 rounds
Range: Very Short
Reloading Speed: Medium
desc: The custom O'Donnel 12 GA shotgun that was called the "Pepper Mill" because of it rotating barrels. "Give 'Em Some Pepper!"

name: 12 GA Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 12 GA
Suitable for: Shotguns
desc: Basic buckshot ammo used by all shotguns. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 12 GA Buckshot Ammo (HE)
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 12 GA
Suitable for: Shotguns
Features: Explodes on impact
desc: Explosive buckshot ammo. Buckshot pellets are filled with an explosive mixture. Extraordinary efforts led to an impressive result. Manufactured by Kaiser's Friends.

name: 12 GA Shotgun Slug
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 12 GA
Suitable for: Shotguns
Features: Single slug
desc: Experimental ammunition that uses a single solid bullet instead of buckshot, which significantly increases lethality. Designed for hunting very large animals. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: Drobulet Shotgun
short:
Type: Shotgun
Caliber: 12 GA
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very Short
Reloading Speed: Medium
desc: A makeshift 12 GA shotgun frequently used by Kaiser's Friends. They call it a "Drobulet" between each other.

name: Drobulet Shotgun (Vertical Choke)
short:
Type: Shotgun
Caliber: 12 GA
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very Short
Reloading Speed: Medium
Features: Vertical choke
desc: A makeshift 12 GA shotgun frequently used by Kaiser's Friends. Additionally equipped with a vertical choke to increase effectiveness against tall and thin targets.

name: Triplet Shotgun
short:
Type: Shotgun
Caliber: 12 GA
Magazine: 3 rounds
Range: Very Short
Reloading Speed: Medium
Features: Volley fire
desc: O'Donnell's exclusive 12-gauge shotgun, nicknamed the "Triplet" because it fires in bursts from all three barrels at once. Blows away everything in its path (literally!).

name: 70 mm Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 70 mm
Suitable for: Shotgun Cannons
desc: Canister shot that contains a high number of small projectiles. Utilized by shotgun cannons.

name: 70 mm Shotgun Cannon Slug
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 70 mm
Suitable for: Shotgun cannons
Features: Single slug
desc: Armor-piercing ammunition with a solid shell, designed for use with 70 mm shotgun cannons. It can't compete with 80 mm long-barreled artillery shells, but without those – beggars can't be choosers.

name: 70 mm Smoke Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 70 mm
Suitable for: Shotgun cannons
Features: Creates smoke cover
desc: A shotgun turret shell casing filled with a special mixture that, when detonated, creates a huge cloud of thick smoke. Not intended to cause damage, but can become a key tactical tool that can change the outcome of a battle. A prototype from Neue Zukunft.

name: 40 mm Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 40 mm
Suitable for: Autocannons
desc: A smaller-caliber cannon shell utilized by autocannons.

name: Long-Range 40 mm Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 40 mm
Suitable for: Autocannons
Features: Increased range
desc: A smaller-caliber cannon shell utilized by autocannons. Contains increased powder charge to increase range.

name: 40 mm Low-Recoil Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 40 mm
Suitable for: Autocannons
Features: Reduced recoil
desc: A 40 mm shell with a slightly altered powder formula, providing reduced recoil at the cost of a lower initial projectile velocity. Even though the projectile is slower, it still remains deadly in close- and medium-range combat encounters. Manufactured by SGOW engineers to extend the service life of older versions of the fleet's autocannons, which had significantly less efficient recoil mechanisms compared to their newer models.

name: Small Valuables
short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Trading
desc: Some valuable knick-knacks left behind by the previous residents during the evacuation.

name: 1874s Petros Sniper Rifle
short:
Type: Heavy Rifle
Caliber: 11 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very High
Reloading Speed: Low
Features: Telescopic sight
desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm sniper rifle. Equipped with a telescopic sight. Every shot counts that much more when you only have one shot available.

name: 11x54 mm Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 11 mm
Suitable for: Heavy rifles
desc: Basic ammo used by long-range rifles. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 11x54 mm AP Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 11 mm
Suitable for: Heavy rifles
Features: Armor-piercing
desc: Special armor-piercing ammo with a hardened penetrating core. Used with long-range rifles. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 1874e Petros Rifle
short:
Type: Heavy Rifle
Caliber: 11 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very High
Reloading Speed: Low
desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm bolt-action rifle. Simple, reliable, and very accurate. Every shot counts that much more when you only have one shot available.

name: 1874e/sd Petros Rifle (Silenced)
short:
Type: Heavy Rifle
Caliber: 11 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very High
Reloading Speed: Low
Features: Silencer
desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm bolt-action rifle. Simple, reliable, and very accurate. Equipped with a silencer. A handy tool to surprise your opponent with.

name: 1874s/sd Petros Sniper Rifle (Silenced)
short:
Type: Heavy Rifle
Caliber: 11 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very High
Reloading Speed: Low
Features: Telescopic sight and silencer
desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm sniper rifle. Equipped with a telescopic sight and a silencer. A handy tool to surprise your opponent with.

name: 80 mm Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 80 mm
Suitable for: Naval cannons
desc: A regular type of shell utilized by Naval Cannons.

name: 80 mm EMP Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 80 mm
Suitable for: Naval cannons
Features: Creates an electromagnetic wave capable of shutting down reactors
desc: One of the Neue Zukunft prototypes. The warhead of a standard 80 mm artillery shell is reinforced with stabilized aurogen crystals. Deals less damage compared to the base shell, but is capable of disabling all aurogen-based machinery in the area of impact.

name: 80 mm Proximity Fuse Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 80 mm
Suitable for: Naval cannons
Features: Proximity detonation and easier aiming
desc: A rather unique invention consisting of a conventional 80 mm cannon shell combined with a proximity fuse. When fired, the shell explodes at a distance sufficient to damage the target, which greatly simplifies aiming – no direct hit required! Invented by some unknown engineer who definitely didn't blow himself up in the process of creating it.

name: High Velocity 80 mm Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 80 mm
Suitable for: Naval cannons
Features: Increased velocity
desc: A modification of standard artillery shells, compatible with naval cannons. Increased initial projectile velocity, made possible by a revised powder charge formula.

name: Valuable Papers
short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Trading
desc: These papers might contain some information that can be sold to someone.

name: Weird Coral
short:
Type: Raw Material?
Purpose: Crafting, Tech Tree
desc: A weirdly shaped coral that emits some brightly colored fumes, similar to those often seen on Upiórs. Inhaling these fumes would probably not be the best idea...
